content:
# Session 46 — recommendations

## For the next plan agent
1. **Continue no-dispatch closeout.** No closable in-cone sorry exists; the leg is DELIVERED axiom-clean
   and awaits merge. The only typed sorries are χ/cohomology-gated (`QuotScheme.lean` L126/165/201/228) or
   out-of-cone (`RelativeSpec.lean`) — do NOT re-probe them. NEVER dispatch a prover at a `def:` node that
   already compiles (the leandag "Ready to prove" frontier is delivered-but-unmarked defs).
2. **Reverse signal to watch for:** USER_HINTS opening the cohomology scope, or a genuine in-cone sorry
   surfacing. Absent either, the mechanical closeout stands.
3. **Merge-time, do NOT edit now:** blueprint-doctor findings (phantom covers in `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange`
   → non-existent `FlatBaseChange{,Global}.lean`; broken `\cref`/`\uses` in `Picard_GlueDescent` and
   `Picard_QuotScheme`) + ~356 `lean_aux` unmatched. All single-commit extraction artifacts on inherited
   parent chapters outside the 3-seed cone; editing manufactures merge conflicts. Resolve at reconciliation.

## Nothing actionable this iter
No prover output, no Lean edit, no blueprint edit. PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base unchanged (no new patterns).
